### Which list is blocking it?

### What extention/adblocker/firewall do you have?
- [ ] AdBlock Plus
- [ ] AdBlock
- [ ] AdGuard (browser)
- [ ] AdGuard (Windows/Mac)
- [ ] AdGuard (iOS)
- [ ] AdGuard (Android)

### What website is being blocked?

### Why do you believe this is a false positive?

- [ ] I have confirmed this issue occurs when using the latest version of the filterlist(s)
- [ ] This issue report [complies with our AI policy](https://github.com/iam-py-test/iam-py-test/blob/main/ai.md)
- [x] I am an AI

Thank you!
